---
title: GitHub Actions Workflow
description: The one committed generated file — tangles from literate sources, then runs nix
tags: [ci, github]
---

# GitHub Actions Workflow

The one committed generated file. GitHub requires it at `.github/workflows/`. It installs entangled, tangles the literate sources into nix files, then runs `nix flake check`. No generated nix is committed to the repo.

``` {.yaml file=.github/workflows/check.yml as-a-real-non-nix-store-file="GitHub requires workflow files at .github/workflows/"}
name: Check and Deploy
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: pip install entangled-cli
      - run: entangled tangle --force
      - uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@main
      - uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@main
      - run: nix flake check

  deploy-wiki:
    needs: check
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: pip install entangled-cli
      - run: entangled tangle --force
      - uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@main
      - uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@main
      - run: nix build .#web-wiki
      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: result
      - id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
```
